Thesis: India's largest crane rental co. (Asia #1, Global #5) riding the infra capex supercycle (NIP ₹111L Cr, 500GW renewables). Business model transitioning from pure crane rental to diversified lifting + Wind EPC (Sangreen) + KSA expansion under Elevate 2030. ROIC 16.7%, ROCE 16.7%, Revenue CAGR 33% (3yr). FCF negative due to aggressive growth capex (₹629 Cr FY26). EV/EBITDA 10.5x — attractive vs history. Narrow moat (fleet scale, depot network, operator expertise). WATCH at ₹415; BUY on correction to ₹360–384 (25% MoS from Base IV ₹480).
